column4: User story
As a Super Admin, I should be able to login using valid credentials.
As a SuperAdmin, after entering credentials I should receive a One-Time Password (OTP) on registered email and should be able to resend the otp if do not receive.
As a Super Admin, I should be able to reset the password
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view total count of Facilitiess, providers, patients, appointments & encounters
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view list of Facilitiess
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to Add a company.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view list of registered companies.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to search and apply filter on the registered companies.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to edit a company's profile.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to set a brand color, company's logo for each company
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add a facility
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view list of Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to edit Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view facility details
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add, edit, delete & view departments.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add, , view, edit & archive users.
As a super admin, I should be able to configure Facilities and assign their line of business

As a super admin, I should be able to enable or disable modules based on each Facility’s business type between 
 - Adult Daycare 
 -  Assisted Living
As a super admin, I should be able to define permissions for staff, providers, caregivers and admin users
As a super admin, I should be able to select supported languages and assign default languages per user
As a super admin, I should be able to set up services, rates, room types and templates for Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view Facilities details
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view providers associated with Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to Create a SuperAdmin in  Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view a list of SuperAdmin in  Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to Edit a SuperAdmin in  Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to Delete / Archive a SuperAdmin in  Facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add locations for Facilitiess
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view location of Facilitiess
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to  view my profile details
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to  update my profile details
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add other users
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view a list of users
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to import & export list of users.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to archive/inactive other users
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to manage roles and permission for all users
As a super admin, I should always view the system in English regardless of location, ensuring consistency in management and configuration
As a user, I should see all app content (labels, menus, notifications, instructions) translated accurately into english language
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add CPT code
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to edit the CPT code
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to inactive the CPT code
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view the CPT codes list
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to Import & Export CPT Codes
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to search and filter the CPT Codes.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add ICD-10 codes
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to edit ICD-10 codes
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to archive ICD-10 codes
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to View the list of ICD-10 codes
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to Import & Export ICD-10 Codes
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to Search and filter the ICD-10 codes.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to manage service codes and map them to specific service types and specialties.
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to view all support tickets submitted by facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to add Speciality
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to edit Speciality
As a Superadmin, I should be able to view list of Specialities
As a Superadmin, I should be able to archive list of specialities
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to create forms using form builder
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to archive forms
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to duplicate form
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to save a form as a template, view the template library, edit, delete and assign templates to specific facilities
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to save and submit a form
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to view all the audit logs for company level
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to download audit logs file in CSV & PDF file
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to Search & filter logs
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to configure each facility's logo to automatically appear on all system-generated documents
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to configure the legal facility name that appears on all document headers
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to configure each facility's logo to appear on all generated invoices
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to view notification settings for different events (User Add, Facility Add, Task)
As an SupeAdmin, I should be able to enable or disable notification channels (SMS, Email, Push Notifications, Family Portal) for each event
As an SuperAdmin, I should be able to save updated notification preferences
As a SuperAdmin, I should track changes made to notification settings
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to configure a facility with a single service type (ADH, ALF, MC, IL or Home Care), a combination of two service types, or all three (IL + ALF + MC).
As a SuperAdmin, I should be able to update a facility's service type combination
